keyFiles.tests: tests/test_generator.py, tests/test_game.py, tests/test_sprint01.py, tests/test_sprint07.py, tests/test_sprint08.py, tests/test_sprint10.py

notes: Sprint 10 added the Chronicle generator: end-of-run Markdown summary with title, metadata, notable-events list, and epitaph blockquote.
New canonical event type 'epitaph' (additive); prose pool gains >= 8 epitaph entries.
Game.end_run(cause='quit') publishes run_ended + epitaph; idempotent; safe no-op when whisperer=False.
Cross-run 'death legends' (Whisperer reading prior chronicles) explicitly deferred.
120 pytest tests pass (34 new sprint-10 tests).
Sprints 3, 4, 5, 6, 9 not yet implemented in tree.
